prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流综合类大学；软科主榜2021年第14名→2022年第11名→2023年第12名→2024年第15名→2025年第15名→2026年第16 名，近年排名略有下滑但仍稳居全国前20；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，共51个事件，主要涉及教师王竹卿学术不端与师德失范举报（30余名硕博联名举报）、 校园开放争议等；2023年曾因地铁事件等12个负面事件被高关注；抖音热度总排名第35位（较热），综合热度约131万，关注度中等；第五轮学科评估A-及以上 共19个：口腔医学A+、中国语言文学A+、护理学A+、临床医学A、数学A、化学A、生物学A、药学A、软件工程A、轻工技术与工程A、马克思主义理论A、中国史A，以及法学A-、计 算机科学与技术A-等，学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学保持推荐热度；本省物理类 考生2021年33.8万→2026年45.6万，累计增长34.9%，2026年较2025年增加约3.6%，竞争持续加剧；四 川大学位于成都（西部），广东考生跨省报考；该校在广东招生占比约3%-4%，近年广东招生人数波动较大（2021年122人→2026年95人），非本省高校存在地域偏好劣势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅缩招18.1%、本省物理类考生增加3.6%以及声誉负面可能抑制部分报考热情，在2025年基准16493名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位次约14752名，区间14252–15252名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10198 → 11488 → 13603 → 14162 → 16493, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6295 places in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 16493, a backward shift of 2331 places compared to 2024, a significant decline; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 122 in both 2021 and 2022, 109 in 2023, 96 in 2024, and rebounded to 116 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 95, a reduction of 21 students (-18.1%) compared to 2025, a relatively large reduction, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; in the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 14th in 2021 → 11th in 2022 → 12th in 2023 → 15th in 2024 → 15th in 2025 → 16th in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years but still firmly among the top 20 nationally; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is clearly negative, with a total of 51 incidents, mainly involving reports of academic misconduct and teacher ethics violations by teacher Wang Zhuqing (joint report by more than 30 master's and doctoral students), campus openness controversies, etc.; in 2023, it was highly concerned due to 12 negative incidents such as the subway incident; Douyin heat total ranking 35th (relatively hot), comprehensive heat about 1.31 million, moderate attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 19 disciplines rated A- and above: Stomatology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Clinical Medicine A, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, Software Engineering A, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese History A, as well as Law A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain recommendation heat; the number of provincial Physics Category examinees increased from 338,000 in 2021 to 456,000 in 2026, a cumulative increase of 34.9%, with an increase of about 3.6% in 2026 compared to 2025, competition continues to intensify; Sichuan University is located in Chengdu (western China), and Guangdong examinees apply across provinces; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangdong is about 3%-4%, and the number of enrollments in Guangdong has fluctuated greatly in recent years (122 in 2021 → 95 in 2026), with a regional preference disadvantage for non-provincial universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, a significant enrollment reduction of 18.1% in 2026, a 3.6% increase in provincial Physics Category examinees, and negative reputation potentially suppressing some application enthusiasm, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 16493; the predicted minimum ranking is about 14752, with a range of 14252–15252.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<14252), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1376 → 1881 → 2362 → 1921 → 2131, showing an overall upward fluctuation, with a cumulative backward shift of about 755 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2131; the provincial History Category enrollment plan increased from 5 in 2021 to 11 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and 28 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 27, a slight decrease of 1 (-3.6%) compared to 2025, essentially stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; ranked 16th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, firmly in the national top 20; the 2026 reputation evaluation is significantly negative, with a total of 51 incidents, mainly involving reports of academic misconduct and teacher ethics violations; Douyin popularity total ranking 35th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 1.31 million; Chinese Language and Literature A+, Law A-, Marxist Theory A, Chinese History A, etc., with outstanding humanities and social sciences strength, highly matching the History Category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is recommended as hot, Chinese Language/Chinese is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; provincial History Category candidates increased from 269,000 in 2021 to 326,000 in 2026, a cumulative increase of 21.1%, with a 2026 increase of about 11.6% over 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, with Guangdong candidates applying across provinces; History Category enrollment in Guangdong increased from 5 to 27, with a rising proportion but still cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward fluctuation trend of historical rankings, the essentially stable 2026 enrollment plan, the significant 11.6% increase in provincial History Category candidates, and negative reputation factors, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 2131; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2115, with a range of 1874–2356.
